text: Walking these hallways and entering this exhibit space, I feel a sense of anticipation and curiosity. The sterile emptiness of the glass-walled room amplifies the contrast with the vibrant energy of the R+D wall. This juxtaposition stirs thoughts about the tension between emptiness and creation, structure and improvisation. Here, amid technological promise and words that hint at memory and openness, I feel at once small and expansive—a participant in the silent dialogue between innovation and the unknown.
